{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Forged snowfoxes
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Forged snowfoxes]] are five-tailed white foxes that serve as tops for the four polished wooden columns outside the [[arena]]; they are almost exact copies of [[Elder Whisper]] and are indistinguishable from [[life]] to every sense except touch.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
